source: International Standard Bible Encyclopaedia (James Orr ed., 1915)
html:
muz, muz'-ing: The word occurs twice in the Old Testament, in the sense of "meditate" (Ps 39:3, chaghigh; Ps 143:5, siach); in the New Testament once (Lu 3:15, dialogizomai, where the Revised Version (British and American) reads "reasoned").

�
